title: CMFRI Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Young Professional I Posts
description: The ICAR Central Marine Fisheries Research Institute (ICAR CMFRI) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Young Professional Post. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed any degree can apply for the CMFRI Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the educational details, age limit, selection process,...
